CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK( sugati__SB_Departure_Airport_l__c ), IF( ISBLANK( sugati__SB_Where_to_go__c ), IF( ISBLANK( sugati__SB_Arrival_Airport_l__c ), IF( ISBLANK(sugati__SB_From_Place_Country_Id__c), IF( ISBLANK( sugati__SB_What_to_do__c ), sugati__SB_Supplier__r.sugati__S_Where_to_go__r.sugati__W_Country__c, sugati__SB_What_to_do__r.sugati__WH_Where_to_go__r.sugati__W_Country__c ), sugati__SB_From_Place_Country_Id__c ), sugati__SB_Arrival_Airport_l__r.sugati__AIR_Country__c ), sugati__SB_Where_to_go__r.sugati__W_Country__c ), IF( BLANKVALUE( sugati__SB_Day__c, 0 ) <= 0, sugati__SB_Arrival_Airport_l__r.sugati__AIR_Country__c, sugati__SB_Departure_Airport_l__r.sugati__AIR_Country__c ) )
CustomField.label: Revenue Country Id
